title: rubus austrolitoralis
intro: Rubus austrolitoralis, also known as the Southern Bramble or Alpine Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus austrolitoralis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Rubus austrolitoralis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
